name: aigen-cogvideox-rain
description: AI-generated child running through heavy rain, with a moving human silhouette, translucent rain streaks, splashes, atmospheric blur and low-contrast depth layers.
citation: CogVideoX-5B official gallery, prompt 2 (boy running in rain)
license_note: Official CogVideo repository sample. The repository and CogVideoX-2B code/model are Apache-2.0; the gallery does not state a separate generated-media license.
source_window: 0.500s; 24 contiguous frames at the native 8 fps and 720x480 resolution
source_artifacts: Visual inspection of frames 1, 12 and 24 found no stable white outline attached to the child. The source itself contains strong motion/defocus blur, translucent rain streaks, bright splash rims, atmospheric veiling and AI-generated temporal shape changes; these must not be attributed to stereo warping.
